title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 174.080 - Organization of boards
text:
174.080.  Organization of boards. — There shall be a president and vice president of each board, who shall be chosen by the members of the respective boards, and each board shall have a secretary and a treasurer and such other officers as may be deemed necessary; but no board shall appoint one of its members treasurer.
(RSMo 1939 § 10757) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 9600; 1919 § 11495; 1909 § 11069
